mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Delia AKA Dora Shockey, Until she Married Lancaster on 04.18.1904
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Delia AKA Dora Shockey, Until she Married Lancaster on 04.18.1904 Noah Wilson, Guardian until Delia Married Recorded in Settlement Book 1,Page 30, in the Floyd County Circuit Court
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
